evidence: Cleared a 30,000-task backlog at SCI, reduced underwriting cycle time by 19%. Shifted digital trading from under 5% to 60%. At CBA, managed record natural catastrophe seasons and additional compliance obligations with a flat headcount through digitisation and process engineering. Integrated claims operations to finalise event claims faster and at lower cost than industry averages. Grew CBA digital sales from 20% to 70%.
